designRead: polished client-work showcase with clearer preview hierarchy
refined innovation studio presentation with practical browsing

styleContinuityAnchors.colorSystem: obsidian and graphite neutrals with a single warm metallic gold brand hue
styleContinuityAnchors.colorSystemMode: shared dark and light system with black-led dark mode and soft off-white light mode
styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: architectural panels with restrained rounded corners and long horizontal lines
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: clean sans serif with display-weight contrast and editorial spacing
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: broad vertical breathing room with tight internal precision
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: quiet premium controls, framed cards, floating planes, disciplined chips
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: dark layered surfaces with subtle glass film, soft lift, and restrained black-led contrast with yellow and red accents
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: no photography, no decorative icon tiles, abstract object-driven hero only

pages.title: Home
pages.visualNorthStar: A premium innovation studio landing page that feels engineered, multilingual, and future-facing without noise.
pages.compositionPattern: Asymmetric two-column with a horizontal portfolio rail
qualityRisks: hero could become generic if too centered
horizontal rail must remain elegant on mobile
multilingual samples must feel intentional rather than mixed-language clutter

pages.title: Portfolio
pages.visualNorthStar: An elegant studio portfolio page with gallery-like composition, restrained contrast, and a refined sense of authorship.
pages.compositionPattern: Straightforward showcase rows with framed previews, featured strips, and premium editorial spacing
qualityRisks: must stay practical and scannable while remaining premium
preview frames must feel real enough to suggest past work without using photography
theme toggle must behave consistently with the homepage

pages.title: Login
pages.visualNorthStar: A premium sign-in screen with calm trust cues, polished form framing, and high-end dark/light adaptability.
pages.compositionPattern: Two-part auth stage with trust panel and restrained form card
qualityRisks: must feel premium without becoming overdesigned
mobile stacking must preserve hierarchy and comfort
form fields must feel more crafted than generic SaaS auth

pages.title: Sign Up
pages.visualNorthStar: A refined onboarding screen that makes account creation feel elevated, clear, and credible.
pages.compositionPattern: Split auth frame with onboarding rail and richer registration form surface
qualityRisks: must stay clean despite richer form content
password guidance and checklist should support rather than clutter
theme toggle and spacing should remain coherent with the rest of the draft
